name: edloidas-audit
description: A Codex-safe audit bundle for skill quality, GitHub Actions, ESLint and Biome overlap, package scripts, and monorepo workspace configuration.

interface.shortDescription: Audit skills, CI, lint overlap, scripts, and workspace setup.
interface.longDescription: Install the audit bundle from edloidas/skills to inspect skill quality, CI workflows, ESLint and Biome overlap, package scripts, and pnpm workspace configuration from Codex.
